userLevel: 中文办公用户 / office user
scenario: Technology trend, public demo, thought leadership, or shareable editorial Web Deck.
narrativeSkeleton: Open with the shift, not the tool list.
Show public signals and why they matter now.
Translate the signal into a workflow, stack, or behavior change.
Show what builders should do differently.
Close with a practical takeaway and source trail.
qualityChecks: Every external signal links to a public source or citation note.
The deck separates observed facts, interpretation, and recommendation.
The first three slides are understandable without narration.
Visual rhythm alternates dense evidence pages and breathing thesis pages.
Desktop and mobile Web Deck views are checked for overlap.
Images show actual product, workflow, or state when possible.
Optional PPTX appendix keeps summary and source trail editable.

qualityProfile.label: 科技趋势 Web Deck 公开展示质量
acceptanceCriteria: every external signal has a public source or citation note
facts, interpretation, and recommendations stay visually separated
visual rhythm alternates evidence pages and thesis pages
desktop and mobile Web Deck views have no overlap or clipped text

notFor: confidential strategy decks that cannot cite public material
formal academic defense decks that require methodology-first structure

sampleProof.notes: Synthetic tech trend skeleton and visible starter proof for public Web Deck demos and source-cited agent handoff.
